magadheesan_velu.name: Magadheesan Velu
magadheesan_velu.summary:
Magadheesan Velu is a U.S. Junior National Champion — a distinction that places Magadheesan among the finest junior players in the country. With 7 career tournament victories across 12 tournaments and 34 total entries, this is a player who consistently rises to the biggest moments.

A true triple-threat, Magadheesan competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, 4 doubles titles, 2 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: National Champion in BD U11 • National Finalist in XD U11 • 2 ORC titles (across 2 tournaments).

Magadheesan has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 9 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Riana Soprala — 9 events, 1 title together in XD
  • Boqian Zheng — 6 events together in BD, producing an outstanding 3 titles

Magadheesan has competed at both U11 and U13, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

Magadheesan has competed across 4 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

Magadheesan has been seeded #1 or #2 in 7 events — a recognition by tournament committees that this player is among the very best in the draw. That target on the back only makes the victories more impressive.

Now in the 2nd season of competition, Magadheesan's journey is gathering momentum with every tournament. The future is bright.

maggie_zang.summary:
Maggie Zang is a dominant force in junior badminton with a staggering 9 tournament titles across 35 tournaments. Over 98 career entries, Maggie has proven time and again that the biggest stage brings out the best performance. Few players can match this level of sustained excellence.

A true triple-threat, Maggie competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, 3 doubles titles, 4 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

  • Jennifer Bangcaya — a trusted GD/U17 partner (10 events, best result: #3)

  • Jaden Ke Hong Chen — 6 events, 1 title together in U15/XD

The 2025-2026 season has been a step up, with 1 title across 7 tournaments — an improvement that shows Maggie is still ascending. The best may yet be ahead.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Maggie has competed across U13, U15, U17 and U19, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Maggie has competed across 5 different regions of the country (NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 12 seeded entries across the career, Maggie consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 9 titles to show for it, Maggie is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

matthew_zhang.name: Matthew Zhang
matthew_zhang.summary:
Matthew Zhang is a rising force in junior badminton, already collecting 4 tournament titles among 45 career entries across 19 tournaments. The trajectory is unmistakable — this is a player whose best chapters are still being written.

A true triple-threat, Matthew competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 2 singles titles, 2 doubles titles, a mixed doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Matthew has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 12 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Felix Liu — a trusted BD partner (8 events, best result: #4)

Matthew has competed at both U11 and U13, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NE, South, Matthew isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 8 seeded entries across the career, Matthew consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience and 4 titles to show for it, Matthew is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

michelle_yourong_zhang.name: Michelle Yourong Zhang
michelle_yourong_zhang.summary:
Michelle Yourong Zhang is a proven champion with 6 tournament titles to go along with 8 Finals and 11 semifinal appearances across 24 tournaments. That kind of consistency at the top doesn't happen by accident — it's the product of relentless preparation and fierce competitive instinct.

A true triple-threat, Michelle competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a singles best of #2, 3 doubles titles, 2 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: 4 ORC titles (across 3 tournaments) • U.S. Selection Event top-1 finisher.

Michelle has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 12 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Selena Wei — 9 events together in GD/U13, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Terence Cai — 9 events together in U15/XD, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Kenneth Wu — a trusted XD partner (8 events, best result: #2)

Having moved up to U19, Michelle is navigating the challenge of tougher competition at the higher age group. The adjustment period is natural — and with the pedigree Michelle brings, a return to the top is a matter of when, not if.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Michelle has competed across U11, U13, U15, U17 and U19, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Michelle has competed across 5 different regions of the country (NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

Michelle has been seeded #1 or #2 in 5 events — a recognition by tournament committees that this player is among the very best in the draw. That target on the back only makes the victories more impressive.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 6 titles to show for it, Michelle is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

Miura Yan Faye Goh is a consistent semifinalist who has reached the final four 4 times across 22 entries in 9 tournaments. That kind of reliability at the top end of the draw is the hallmark of a player with genuine title-winning potential.

A true triple-threat, Miura competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a singles best of #3, a mixed doubles best of #3. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Miura has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 11 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Vignan Chandrasekaran — 3 events in XD, best: #3

A veteran of the junior circuit, Miura has competed across U11, U13 and U15, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Miura brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.

mizuki_ikeuchi.name: Mizuki Ikeuchi
mizuki_ikeuchi.summary:
Mizuki Ikeuchi is a U.S. Junior National Champion — a distinction that places Mizuki among the finest junior players in the country. With 10 career tournament victories across 12 tournaments and 34 total entries, this is a player who consistently rises to the biggest moments.

A true triple-threat, Mizuki competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 5 singles titles, 4 doubles titles, 1 mixed doubles title. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: National Champion in GS U13 • 3 ORC titles (across 3 tournaments).

Mizuki has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 12 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Arnav Satish — a trusted XD partner (4 events, best result: #4)
  • Medha Sivani Gudavalli — 3 events together in GD, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Alaina Benjamin — 3 events, 1 title together in GD

The 2025-2026 season has been outstanding, with 6 podium finishes across 5 tournaments. Mizuki is playing some of the best badminton of the career right now.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Mizuki has competed across U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With tournaments spanning NE, NW, South, Mizuki isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 9 seeded entries across the career, Mizuki consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 3 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Mizuki brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.
